problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Rhizobium. Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
